title: sonchus pendulus subsp. flaccidus
intro: Sonchus pendulus subsp. flaccidus, also known as the soft sowthistle, is a subspecies of the Sowthistle plant that has a perennial nature and is characterized by its soft, pale yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The soft sowthistle is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
